name: Stormrazor

passives.name: Energized
passives.effects: Moving and basic attacking generates ''Energize'' stacks, up to 100.

passives.name: Bolt
passives.effects: When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as|100 '''bonus''' magic damage}} [[on-hit]] and grants you {{as|45% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Moving and basic attacking generates Energize stacks, up to 100.
At full Energize, your next basic attack deals 100 bonus magic damage and grants 45% bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds.

simpleDescription: Periodically kill enemy minions to heal and grant gold to a nearby ally

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Energized/Bolt execution semantics from page-level source: moving and attacking generate Energize stacks, and Bolt consumes a fully energized attack to apply bonus magic on-hit and temporary self movement speed.
Bolt interaction note: energized on-hit effects apply to structures; Bolt excludes inhibitors and nexus targets per page-level notes/bug history.
